title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at SpiceJet

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at SpiceJet
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, SpiceJet in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SpiceJet:
SpiceJet is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet!
